scripts.desktop:start: npm run assets:icons && npm run desktop:build:frontend && npm run desktop:build:backend && electron .
scripts.desktop:pack: npm run assets:icons && npm run desktop:build:frontend && npm run desktop:build:backend && electron-builder --dir
scripts.desktop:dist: npm run assets:icons && npm run desktop:build:frontend && npm run desktop:build:backend && electron-builder
scripts.desktop:dist:win: npm run assets:icons && npm run desktop:build:frontend && node desktop/scripts/build-backend.mjs --target win32:x64 && electron-builder --win nsis portable
scripts.desktop:dist:mac: npm run assets:icons && npm run desktop:build:frontend && node desktop/scripts/build-backend.mjs --target darwin:x64 --target darwin:arm64 && electron-builder --mac dmg zip
scripts.desktop:dist:linux: npm run assets:icons && npm run desktop:build:frontend && node desktop/scripts/build-backend.mjs --target linux:x64 --target linux:arm64 && electron-builder --linux AppImage deb tar.gz
